---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

import pandas as pd, math, json

df = pd.read_csv('events.csv')

def safe(v):
    return '' if (isinstance(v, float) and math.isnan(v)) else str(v).strip()

events = []
for _, r in df.iterrows():
    events.append({
        'year':    int(r['year']),
        'cat':     safe(r['category']),
        'sub':     safe(r['subcategory']),
        'title':   safe(r['title']),
        'authors': safe(r['authors']),
        'journal': safe(r['journal']),
        'vol':     safe(r['volume_issue_pages']),
        'inst':    safe(r['institution']),
        'pmid':    safe(r['pmid']),
        'desc':    safe(r['description']),
    })

print(f'<script>var EVENTS={json.dumps(events, ensure_ascii=False)};</script>')
```

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html, body {
    height: 100%; overflow: hidden;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    background: #080f1a;
    color: #e2e8f0;
  }
  #quarto-content, main.content, .page-full,
  #quarto-document-content { padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; height: 100% !important; }

  /* ── Shell ── */
  #app { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; }

  /* ── Header ── */
  #hdr {
    flex-shrink: 0;
    height: 60px;
    background: #0f172a;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
    display: flex; align-items: center;
    padding: 0 1.4rem; gap: 1rem;
  }
  #hdr .title {
    font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 700; color: #f1f5f9;
    white-space: nowrap; margin-right: .4rem;
  }
  #hdr .sep { width: 1px; height: 26px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); flex-shrink: 0; }

  /* filter chips */
  .chip {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
    padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; border: none;
    font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;
    transition: opacity .15s, transform .1s;
    letter-spacing: .03em;
  }
  .chip:hover  { opacity: .85; }
  .chip.off    { opacity: .28; }
  .chip .pip   { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; }

  #hdr .hint { margin-left: auto; font-size: .68rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,.28); white-space: nowrap; }

  /* ── Scroll area ── */
  #scroll-wrap { flex: 1; position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  #scroll {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: hidden;
    cursor: grab;
  }
  #scroll:active { cursor: grabbing; }
  #scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { height: 4px; }
  #scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #1e3a5f; border-radius: 2px; }

  /* ── Canvas ── */
  #canvas { position: relative; height: 100%; min-width: 5800px; }

  /* ── Bar ── */
  #bar {
    position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0f2240 0%, #1e3a5f 40%, #0f2240 100%);
    border-top:    1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  }

  /* ── Year labels ── */
  .yr {
    position: absolute;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-weight: 800; transform: translateX(-50%);
    pointer-events: none; z-index: 4;
    letter-spacing: -.02em; transition: color .25s;
  }
  .yr.dim    { color: rgba(255,255,255,.08); font-size: 22px; }
  .yr.active { color: rgba(255,255,255,.5);  font-size: 36px; }

  /* ── Event wrapper ── */
  .ev { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 1px; z-index: 10; }
  .ev:hover { z-index: 80; }
  .ev.hidden { display: none; }

  /* ── Dot ── */
  .dot {
    position: absolute; width: 14px; height: 14px;
    border-radius: 50%; left: -7px; z-index: 20;
    border: 2.5px solid #080f1a;
    transition: transform .2s;
  }
  .ev:hover .dot { transform: scale(1.5); }

  /* ── Connector ── */
  .conn { position: absolute; width: 2px; left: -1px; z-index: 8; opacity: .4; }

  /* ── Card ── */
  .card {
    position: absolute; width: 178px; left: -89px;
    border-radius: 12px; padding: 11px 13px;
    overflow: hidden;
    transition: height .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), box-shadow .2s;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  }
  .ev:hover .card { box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.7); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.18); }

  .card .c-year  { font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 700; opacity: .5; letter-spacing: .06em; margin-bottom: 5px; }
  .card .c-emoji { font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 4px; display: block; }
  .card .c-title {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.38;
    color: #fff; margin-bottom: 0;
    display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 4; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .card .c-more {
    margin-top: 8px; opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity .2s ease .15s;
    font-size: 10.5px; line-height: 1.5; color: rgba(255,255,255,.78);
  }
  .card .c-more .m-authors { opacity: .65; margin-bottom: 2px; font-size: 10px; }
  .card .c-more .m-journal { font-style: italic; opacity: .75; margin-bottom: 5px; font-size: 10px; }
  .card .c-more .m-inst    { opacity: .55; margin-bottom: 6px; font-size: 10px; }
  .card .c-more .m-desc    { opacity: .9; }
  .card .c-more .m-pmid    { opacity: .35; font-size: 9px; margin-top: 5px; }
  .ev:hover .card .c-more  { opacity: 1; }

  /* color themes */
  .card.grant     { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #1e3a8a, #1d4ed8 120%); }
  .card.pub       { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #881337, #be123c 120%); }
  .card.ramirez   { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #4c1d95, #7c3aed 120%); }
  .card.milestone { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #064e3b, #059669 120%); }

  .dot.grant     { background: #3b82f6; }
  .dot.pub       { background: #f43f5e; }
  .dot.ramirez   { background: #a855f7; }
  .dot.milestone { background: #10b981; }

  .conn.grant     { background: #3b82f6; }
  .conn.pub       { background: #f43f5e; }
  .conn.ramirez   { background: #a855f7; }
  .conn.milestone { background: #10b981; }

  /* ── Nav arrows ── */
  .arrow {
    position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.06); color: rgba(255,255,255,.6);
    font-size: 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
    cursor: pointer; z-index: 400;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transition: background .2s, color .2s;
  }
  .arrow:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.15); color: #fff; }
  .arrow.left  { left: 8px; }
  .arrow.right { right: 8px; }
</style>

<div id="app">
  <div id="hdr">
    <div class="title">HCC Research &mdash; Grants &amp; Key Publications &mdash; Texas 2009&ndash;2025</div>
    <div class="sep"></div>
    <button class="chip" id="f-grant"     style="background:#1d4ed8;color:#fff" onclick="toggleFilter('grant')"    ><span class="pip" style="background:#93c5fd"></span>Grants</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-pub"       style="background:#be123c;color:#fff" onclick="toggleFilter('pub')"      ><span class="pip" style="background:#fda4af"></span>Publications</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-ramirez"   style="background:#7c3aed;color:#fff" onclick="toggleFilter('ramirez')"  ><span class="pip" style="background:#c4b5fd"></span>Ramirez Lab</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-milestone" style="background:#059669;color:#fff" onclick="toggleFilter('milestone')" ><span class="pip" style="background:#6ee7b7"></span>Milestones</button>
    <div class="hint">Drag &nbsp;·&nbsp; Hover to expand &nbsp;·&nbsp; Filter by type</div>
  </div>

  <div id="scroll-wrap">
    <button class="arrow left"  onclick="pan(-480)">&#8592;</button>
    <button class="arrow right" onclick="pan(480)">&#8594;</button>
    <div id="scroll">
      <div id="canvas">
        <div id="bar"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {

  /* ── Color / emoji maps ── */
  function typeOf(cat, sub) {
    if (cat === 'Grant')     return 'grant';
    if (cat === 'Milestone') return 'milestone';
    if (sub === 'Ramirez Lab') return 'ramirez';
    return 'pub';
  }
  var EMOJI = { grant:'🏆', pub:'📄', ramirez:'🔬', milestone:'🎯' };

  /* ── Geometry ── */
  var MIN_YEAR = 2009, SPAN = 16;
  var CANVAS_W = 5800, PAD = 260;
  var USABLE   = CANVAS_W - PAD * 2;

  function idealX(yr) { return PAD + ((yr - MIN_YEAR) / SPAN) * USABLE; }

  /* ── Annotate type + initial x ── */
  var groups = {};
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e, i) {
    e.type = typeOf(e.cat, e.sub);
    e.idx  = i;
    (groups[e.year] = groups[e.year] || []).push(i);
  });
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e, i) {
    var g = groups[e.year];
    e._x  = idealX(e.year) + (g.indexOf(i) - (g.length - 1) / 2) * 190;
  });

  /* ── Collision resolution ── */
  var sorted = EVENTS.slice().sort(function(a, b) { return a._x - b._x; });
  var MIN_GAP = 182;
  for (var pass = 0; pass < 150; pass++) {
    var moved = false;
    for (var j = 1; j < sorted.length; j++) {
      var gap = sorted[j]._x - sorted[j-1]._x;
      if (gap < MIN_GAP) {
        var push = (MIN_GAP - gap) / 2 + .5;
        sorted[j-1]._x -= push; sorted[j]._x += push; moved = true;
      }
    }
    if (!moved) break;
  }

  /* ── Build after layout ── */
  window.addEventListener('load', function () {
    var scroll  = document.getElementById('scroll');
    var canvas  = document.getElementById('canvas');
    var bar     = document.getElementById('bar');
    var H       = scroll.clientHeight;

    var BAR_H   = 62;
    var barTop  = Math.round(H * 0.44);
    var barMid  = barTop + Math.round(BAR_H / 2);

    bar.style.top    = barTop + 'px';
    bar.style.height = BAR_H  + 'px';

    /* card zones */
    var GAP        = 20;
    var aboveBot   = barTop - GAP;
    var aboveTop   = 12;
    var aboveFullH = aboveBot - aboveTop;
    var aboveHalfH = Math.round(aboveFullH * 0.46);

    var belowTop   = barTop + BAR_H + GAP;
    var belowFullH = H - belowTop - 12;
    var belowHalfH = Math.round(belowFullH * 0.46);

    /* year labels */
    var activeYrs = {};
    EVENTS.forEach(function(e) { activeYrs[e.year] = true; });
    for (var yr = MIN_YEAR; yr <= MIN_YEAR + SPAN; yr++) {
      var lbl = document.createElement('div');
      lbl.className = 'yr ' + (activeYrs[yr] ? 'active' : 'dim');
      lbl.style.cssText = 'left:' + idealX(yr) + 'px;top:' + barTop + 'px;height:' + BAR_H + 'px;';
      lbl.textContent = yr;
      canvas.appendChild(lbl);
    }

    /* events */
    sorted.forEach(function(e, si) {
      var above  = (si % 2 === 0);
      var halfH  = above ? aboveHalfH : belowHalfH;
      var fullH  = above ? aboveFullH : belowFullH;
      var x      = e._x;

      var wrap = document.createElement('div');
      wrap.className   = 'ev';
      wrap.style.left  = x + 'px';
      wrap.dataset.type = e.type;

      /* dot */
      var dot = document.createElement('div');
      dot.className = 'dot ' + e.type;
      dot.style.top = (barMid - 7) + 'px';
      wrap.appendChild(dot);

      /* connector */
      var conn = document.createElement('div');
      conn.className = 'conn ' + e.type;
      if (above) {
        conn.style.top    = (aboveBot) + 'px';
        conn.style.height = (barTop - aboveBot) + 'px';
      } else {
        conn.style.top    = (barTop + BAR_H) + 'px';
        conn.style.height = (belowTop - barTop - BAR_H) + 'px';
      }
      wrap.appendChild(conn);

      /* card */
      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = 'card ' + e.type;
      card.style.height = halfH + 'px';
      if (above) { card.style.bottom = (H - aboveBot) + 'px'; card.style.top = 'auto'; }
      else        { card.style.top   = belowTop + 'px'; }

      var more = '';
      if (e.authors) more += '<div class="m-authors">' + e.authors + '</div>';
      if (e.journal) {
        var cite = e.journal + (e.vol ? ' ' + e.vol : '');
        more += '<div class="m-journal">' + cite + '</div>';
      }
      if (e.inst)    more += '<div class="m-inst">📍 ' + e.inst + '</div>';
      if (e.desc)    more += '<div class="m-desc">'  + e.desc  + '</div>';
      if (e.pmid)    more += '<div class="m-pmid">PMID ' + e.pmid + '</div>';

      card.innerHTML =
        '<div class="c-year">' + e.year + '</div>' +
        '<span class="c-emoji">' + EMOJI[e.type] + '</span>' +
        '<div class="c-title">' + e.title + '</div>' +
        '<div class="c-more">'  + more   + '</div>';

      wrap.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() { card.style.height = fullH + 'px'; });
      wrap.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { card.style.height = halfH + 'px'; });

      wrap.appendChild(card);
      canvas.appendChild(wrap);
    });

    /* drag scroll */
    var isDown = false, sx, sl;
    scroll.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) { isDown=true; sx=e.pageX-scroll.offsetLeft; sl=scroll.scrollLeft; });
    scroll.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { isDown=false; });
    scroll.addEventListener('mouseup',   function() { isDown=false; });
    scroll.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) {
      if (!isDown) return; e.preventDefault();
      scroll.scrollLeft = sl - (e.pageX - scroll.offsetLeft - sx);
    });
  });

  /* ── Filter ── */
  var hidden = {};
  window.toggleFilter = function(type) {
    hidden[type] = !hidden[type];
    document.getElementById('f-' + type).classList.toggle('off', !!hidden[type]);
    document.querySelectorAll('.ev[data-type="' + type + '"]').forEach(function(el) {
      el.classList.toggle('hidden', !!hidden[type]);
    });
  };

  window.pan = function(dx) {
    document.getElementById('scroll').scrollBy({ left: dx, behavior: 'smooth' });
  };

})();
</script>
```
